'''Ganar Tos''' was the elderly [[Zisian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] of the [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] [[Teroenza]] on the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] factory [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. He had greenish skin, saggy jowls and rheumy [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].

==Biography==
It was the misfortune of pilgrim [[Bria Tharen]] that Ganar Tos developed an attraction to her while she tended [[Teroenza]]'s [[Museum/Legends|museum]] pieces. Ganar Tos was rewarded for his good work when the [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] attempted to [[Marriage/Legends|marry]] Bria to him, but unfortunately for Ganar, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] escaped with her off-[[Planet/Legends|world]] before the marriage could begin.

Ganar Tos remained the [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] for Teroenza in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] that followed, serving the High Priest faithfully, but always harboring enmity in his [[Heart/Legends|heart]] towards Han Solo for taking away his bride-to-be. He was one of the few people to survive the [[Battle of Ylesia]]. Ganar was eventually picked up from the planet along with the surviving [[Nova Force]] troops by Durga when he arrived in his [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] and presumably continued to work for the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
